judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent followed a reasonable plan but implemented it incorrectly by using a brittle heuristic to detect publication year (searching for the literal "2016" only in the first 2000 characters of each paper's text) and an invalid Mongo filter with duplicate keys, causing it to miss valid 2016 'physical activity' papers and return an empty result despite querying the correct databases.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python step filtered papers by simply checking if the full text contained the substring “2016” and “physical activity” (from the Mongo results) and then joined with globally aggregated citations (SELECT title, SUM(citation_count)), rather than extracting actual publication year and domain, leading to many incorrect titles and mismatched totals.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent naively filtered Mongo documents by checking for the literal strings "2016" and "physical activity" anywhere in the full text (call_DqnV6D8jaIVAEQBRco2lnQlW and call_19S11UBkbeG14f9Ym1EwbD8G) rather than extracting publication year and domain metadata, then joined to overall citation sums (call_ZdgdTjZEw7leSZSa9pY9Zfkw), resulting in incorrect titles and counts.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent aggregated citations by title correctly but then identified 2016 “physical activity” papers by naively regex-searching for “2016” and “physical activity” anywhere in the full text (execute_python using var_call_hSqNQ6fvV01Q7VPIdZBdjwN1 and var_call_oVSA9if4X5XojaxYslTstn6M), compounded by a malformed Mongo filter with duplicate "text" keys, causing inclusion of many non-2016 or non-domain papers and mismatched results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent implemented year/domain extraction incorrectly by simply regex-matching "2016" and "physical activity" anywhere in the full text (execute_python using var_call_2af0Ig6P1JqAn6pC7A5pWUYz), which included non-2016 and off-domain papers (e.g., an apparent CHI 2018 paper), then joined to aggregated citations (var_call_S7rRiRU6gGjocPSr6NjcB118), yielding titles and counts that do not match the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
